title: S.R. Batliboi Advisory Limited is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: S.R. Batliboi Advisory Limited is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
S.R. Batliboi Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Amritsar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About S.R. Batliboi Advisory Limited:
S.R. Batliboi Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with S.R. Batliboi Advisory Limited!
